## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] Critical - Blocking my use of the application
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## Complexity Estimate

<!-- Your estimate of implementation complexity -->

- [ ] Simple - Few hours of work
- [ ] Medium - Few days of work
- [ ] Complex - Week+ of work
- [ ] Very Complex - Requires significant architectural changes

## Checklist
